label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So the question is about Jane's birthday and figuring out the date one week from her 16th birthday. Let's break it down step by step. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. The last day of February is usually the 29th, right? But wait, February 29th only exists in leap years. 2000 was a leap year because it's divisible by 400. So yes, she was born on 02/29/2000. Now, today is her 16th birthday. Since she was born on February 29th, but that date only comes every four years, people born on February 29th typically celebrate their birthdays on either February 28th or March 1st in non-leap
